CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond, CSR#5292. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Continued To Jul-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley. CSR 225. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Debra Douglas, also present.
John Dubois, Esq. for Defendant: Angela Renghini Ind dba Smokin Okies BBQ.
Defendant's Witness: Angela Renghini, also present.
Case settled and read into the record as follows:
Stipulated for judgment in the sum of $6,000.00 by installments without any additional Interest.
$1,000.00 due on Nove 2, 2007
payment of $1,000.00 each at the end of Nov. 2007 through end of Mar. 2008
Notice of default to counsel by FAX with 10 days to cured or for entry of judgment for balance plus interest.
Parties agreed to terms/
Matter is placed on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar on April 15, 2008 at 10 A.M. in Dept. 212.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
